steps.name: QuickAdd uses active area for one-offs
steps.criteria: The Add button in QuickAdd uses the active house area (from sweep context) instead of hardcoded Kitchen Cabinets. Label changes to 'Add one-off' for clarity. If no active area, falls back to first area in list. Section defaults to 'General' instead of 'Unknown'.

steps.name: One-off items visually distinct in trip list
steps.criteria: TripItemRow shows a small 'one-off' label or different style for one-off items in home view so Carlos can distinguish them from staples at a glance.
